leaf_scores.justification: Summary explicitly states encoder is single-hidden-layer MLP outputting mu and log_sigma^2 of diagonal Gaussian; train.py docstring confirms tanh activation.
Summary explicitly mentions reparameterization trick z = mu + sigma * eps consistent with the requirement.
Summary states SGVB ELBO loss with closed-form Gaussian KL and L=1 sample per datapoint, matching eq. 7/10.
train.py sets BASE_LR=0.01 and WEIGHT_DECAY=1e-4 with comment referencing Adagrad and Gaussian prior; consistent with requirement.
load_mnist divides by 255.0 mapping pixels to [0,1] for Bernoulli decoder.
Train/test split used and Ntrain=1000 evaluated, but only 1000 (not 50000) was run since GPU branch not taken; partial.
BATCH_SIZE=100 and L_SAMPLES=1 are set, matching Algorithm 1.
ML experiment for AEVB/WS/MCEM at Nz=3 Ntrain=1000 is run, but no evidence of 100 hidden units, N(0,0.01) init, or Adagrad stepsize search from {0.01,0.02,0.1}.
SEED=42 is set and training_curves.json is produced; x-axis being training samples is plausible but not explicitly verified.
train_elbo_final and test_elbo_final reported per model in nats consistent with Figure 2 quantity.
No evidence of three-stage HMC + density-estimator importance sampling from Appendix D; report just mentions Nz=1000 IS estimate.
MCEM result is reported but no visible evidence of 10 HMC leapfrog steps tuned to ~90% acceptance and 5 Adagrad updates per sample.
Wake-sleep baseline at Nz=3 is run and reported; same architecture/Adagrad schedule plausible but not explicitly shown.
AEVB beats WS at Nz=3 (-156 vs -173) and best AEVB reached -123 at Nz=20, but does not reach the [-110,-100] range expected for larger Nz.
AEVB (-200.0) > WS (-200.6) > MCEM (-204.9) ordering matches qualitatively, but Ntrain=1000 was used not 50000 as required.
train.py exists and a README.md is present in outputs, but there is no evidence the README lists exact commands to reproduce Figures 2, 3, and 4.
fig_2_mnist.png and fig_3_marginal_loglik.png are present, but no Figure 4 (latent manifold) and no saved model checkpoints are evident.
No requirements.txt, environment.yml, or Dockerfile is shown in the code listing.
